plugin_desc: Baseline SNMP child template for C-Data GPON and EPON access devices under the CDATA-GPON-MIB enterprise tree. The current MIB facts confirm the C-Data enterprise root and GPON access-device family, but no reliable row-filter-free scalar CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power-supply OID was confirmed. This child therefore declares no vendor-specific metric deltas in metrics.json; the shared Access SNMP floor supplies uptime, IF-MIB interface metrics including 64-bit ifHCInOctets and ifHCOutOctets, and aggregate device traffic. Supported brands/models — C-Data GPON and EPON OLT devices that expose standard IF-MIB.
name: Access
